name: cetus.call-e
description: Connect to CALL-E so the agent can plan, place, and review real outbound phone calls.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and run real outbound phone calls through CALL-E.
interface.longDescription: CALL-E is an AI voice agent for making real phone calls on behalf of the user. The plugin contributes the CALL-E MCP server configuration plus setup and safety guidance.
defaultPrompt: Call the business and reschedule my appointment.
Plan a CALL-E phone call, but do not start it until I confirm.
